title: John Paul Jones and the War at Sea
author: Roughdraft Stories
description: John Paul Jones carried the American Revolution onto the ocean and straight to Britain's own shores. This factual narrative follows his restless early life, his naval command, the desperate battle with HMS Serapis, and the legend that followed.

chapters.title: From Scotland to a New Cause
I Have Not Yet Begun to Fight
What a Navy Needed from a Legend
